title: Lightspeed
description: A modpack with awesome QoL improvents, and it features a enormous fps boost.
body:
Lightspeed is  an amazing modpack with really good QoL improvements and a huge fps boost. Don't believe me? Look at this:

(if you still dont belive me there is a fps counter in the corner)

*My specs:*

*CPU: Ryzen 7 4000 series*

*GPU: Geforce RTX 3060 mobile (laptop)*

*RAM: 16 GB*

![FPS with Vanilla](https://i.imgur.com/Ksi5AUB.png)


![FPS with LIGHTSPEED](https://i.imgur.com/N8VB3ed.png)

Lightspeed supports shaders, texture packs with custom models, skyboxes and more!


I developed this modpack with this in mind to make the best optimization modpack. I developed this mod pack for more than 6 months. And there it was . I achieved frame rates  really high compared to my previous record of around 400 FPS in Lunar Client and now, i achieved 450 fps (in hypixel bedwars) with the original textures. I am determinated that this is the best modpack i will ever make.  


(All the records were done on my PC (for specs look up))





In lightspeed you have lots of quality of life features, like Chunky, this mod could render worlds with a single command! And much MUCH more!
 
And if you like this modpack i would be really happy if you would leave me a follow. Thanks.
